title: nepeta hymenodonta
intro: Nepeta hymenodonta, also known as Balkan catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Balkan catmint is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
